title: Startale raises $50M from SBI to complete $63M Series A
message_html: Startale raises $50M from SBI to complete $63M Series A ...
snippet: Startale said SBI invested $50 million to complete its Series A, with the firms working on tokenized securities, stablecoins and consumer onchain products in Japan.
